# Itaju Group

> Itaju Group builds and operates ventures in Paraguay: permanent residency,
> investment, and clean energy infrastructure. One country, three doors.

Itaju Group is a holding company building inside one of the fastest growing
economies in South America. Paraguay offers a territorial tax system, a flat
10% corporate and personal income tax, no tax on foreign income, no wealth or
inheritance tax, an electricity grid running almost entirely on renewable
hydropower with a large surplus, and an economy that crossed into investment
grade with Moody's in 2024 and S&P in 2025.

## Ventures

- [Itaju Residency](https://itajuresidency.com): Permanent residency in
  Paraguay, secured end to end, with one short trip required. Status: live.
- Itaju Capital: Investment into Paraguay. We research opportunities, handle
  acquisition, and manage holdings on behalf of investors. Status: coming soon.
- Itaju Energy: Turning Paraguay's hydro surplus into infrastructure for AI
  data centers and Bitcoin mining on clean, cost efficient renewable energy.
  Status: coming soon.
